items.title: Genuinely Good & Challenging
items.summary: It seems easy at first. But don’t be fooled. This game gets hard and requires more thinking later on. Also it’s gorgeous. I also think you should be 18+ to play this though. I’ve played numerous gacha/card games and this has a classical feel to it with a dark storyline and background. They’re not afraid to tap into violent themes that align with the game’s narrative. I love slay the spire, r1999, balatro, limbus, etc. this game is fire.
items.author: Yubi111000
